subject: feat(menu): extract BurgerMenu.vue with a11y hardening + z-index scale
body:
Extracted burger menu from AppLayout into standalone BurgerMenu.vue with
all glow-props disclosure pattern fixes. Formalized z-index scale in
CLAUDE.md and normalized all components to match.

Burger Menu Hardening:
- Disclosure pattern: aria-expanded, aria-controls, <nav>+<ul>/<li>
  (not role="menu" — wrong ARIA semantics for navigation)
- Escape key handler (registered only while open)
- cursor-pointer on backdrop (iOS Safari empty div fix)
- overscroll-contain on dropdown (prevents scroll chaining)
- Focus management: first item on open, trigger on close
  (hasBeenOpen guard prevents focus steal on mount)
- focus-visible:ring-2 on items for keyboard navigation
- AppLayout simplified: items as computed data, BurgerMenu handles UX

Z-Index Scale (CLAUDE.md):
- Added scale table (0→80 range)
- Debug pill: z-[9999] → z-[80]
- Toast: z-[100] → z-[70]

CLAUDE.md Sync:
- Added "Discontinued repos" AI note (plant-fur, coin-zapp)

Tags: a11y, ux, burger-menu, z-index, glow-props-sync, refactor
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium

Epic: glow-props-sync
